theme.en: AI Infrastructure Redirects Capital Across the Stack
theme.zh: AI基础设施重塑全栈资本流向

dek.en: HBM4 revenue arrives quickly, Groq refuels after a leadership reset, and GPU capacity becomes a leaseable asset. China-tool concerns and new supplier facilities show that compute demand is reshaping manufacturing and policy, not just accelerator roadmaps.
dek.zh: HBM4迅速形成收入，Groq在管理层重组后补充资金，GPU算力也成为可出租资产。对中国先进设备能力的担忧与新供应商设施表明，算力需求正在重塑制造和政策，而不只是加速器路线图。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Nvidia Introduces Warm-Water Closed-Loop Data-Center Cooling
title.zh: Nvidia推出数据中心温水闭环冷却方案

summary.en: Nvidia introduced a warm-water closed-loop cooling design that the report says can eliminate on-site water consumption for compatible data centers. The design moves AI-infrastructure optimization beyond chips toward facility power and water constraints, although the candidate record provides no deployment scale or thermal-performance figures.
summary.zh: Nvidia推出温水闭环冷却设计；报道宣称，在兼容的数据中心中，该方案可消除现场用水。它把AI基础设施优化从芯片层延伸到机房供电与用水约束，但候选资料未提供部署规模或散热性能数据。

title.en: Arm Servers Exceed 45% of Data-Center Revenue
title.zh: Arm服务器占数据中心营收比重超过45%

summary.en: Arm-based servers accounted for more than 45% of data-center server revenue in Q1 2026, according to the report, as GPU clusters and high-end AI systems favored Arm host processors. This is a revenue-share measure rather than unit share, but it still shows AI infrastructure accelerating the market shift away from x86.
summary.zh: 报道显示，受GPU集群和高端AI系统采用Arm主机处理器推动，Arm服务器在2026年第一季度占数据中心服务器营收的比例超过45%。这一数字衡量的是营收份额而非出货量份额，但仍表明AI基础设施正在加速市场从x86迁移。

title.en: SpaceX Leases Colossus 2 GPU Capacity in $6.3 Billion Deal
title.zh: SpaceX以63亿美元交易出租Colossus 2 GPU算力

summary.en: SpaceX reportedly agreed to lease Colossus 2 capacity to Reflection in a $6.3 billion compute deal, with payments of $150 million per month beginning in July for access to Nvidia GB300 GPUs. The arrangement turns a privately built AI cluster into a merchant-compute asset and gives the market a concrete price signal for scarce, large-scale GPU capacity.
summary.zh: 据报道，SpaceX同意以63亿美元的算力交易向Reflection出租Colossus 2容量，后者自7月起每月支付1.5亿美元以使用Nvidia GB300 GPU。该安排把私建AI集群转化为商业算力资产，也为稀缺的大规模GPU容量提供了具体价格信号。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: Halo Vista's First Industrial Project Targets TSMC Suppliers
title.zh: Halo Vista首个工业项目面向TSMC供应商

summary.en: Halo Vista's first industrial project will be designed for companies supplying TSMC, according to The Business Journals. The project signals that foundry localization is pulling adjacent suppliers toward dedicated real estate, though the candidate record does not specify tenants, floor area, or opening timing.
summary.zh: 据The Business Journals报道，Halo Vista的首个工业项目将面向TSMC供应商。该项目显示，晶圆代工本地化正在带动配套供应商进入专用工业地产，但候选资料未披露租户、建筑面积或启用时间。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Samsung HBM4 Sales Top $1 Billion Four Months After Launch
title.zh: Samsung HBM4上市四个月销售额突破10亿美元

summary.en: Samsung's HBM4 sales exceeded $1 billion only four months after launch, Yonhap reports. The pace indicates that next-generation HBM is already converting qualification and capacity work into material revenue, strengthening Samsung's position as AI-memory demand broadens beyond a single supplier.
summary.zh: 据韩联社报道，Samsung HBM4上市仅四个月，销售额就突破10亿美元。这一速度表明，下一代HBM的认证与产能投入已开始转化为可观收入，也增强了Samsung在AI存储需求向多家供应商扩散时的竞争地位。

title.en: Samsung UFS 5.0 Reaches 10.8 GB/s Sequential Reads
title.zh: Samsung UFS 5.0顺序读取速度达到10.8 GB/s

summary.en: Samsung unveiled UFS 5.0 storage rated for sequential reads up to 10.8 GB/s and writes up to 9.5 GB/s, more than twice the read speed of UFS 4.1; Qualcomm's Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 is reported to support it. The bandwidth increase gives on-device AI models more room to stream weights and data, although real application gains will depend on controller behavior and sustained performance.
summary.zh: Samsung发布UFS 5.0存储，顺序读取最高10.8 GB/s、写入最高9.5 GB/s，读取速度超过UFS 4.1的两倍；报道称Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6将提供支持。带宽提升可为端侧AI模型加载权重和数据提供更大空间，但实际应用收益仍取决于控制器行为与持续性能。

title.en: SK hynix Shifts Toward DRAM as Margins Overtake HBM
title.zh: SK hynix在DRAM利润率超过HBM后调整产能方向

summary.en: SK hynix is reportedly shifting its production mix toward conventional DRAM because DRAM margins have moved above HBM margins. If sustained, the move could constrain HBM growth at the market leader and create an opening for Samsung, while showing that memory allocation still follows near-term profitability rather than AI demand alone.
summary.zh: 据报道，由于DRAM利润率已超过HBM，SK hynix正在把产品组合更多转向传统DRAM。如果这一趋势持续，可能限制这家市场领先者的HBM增量并给Samsung留下空间，也说明存储产能分配仍受短期利润驱动，而非只看AI需求。

title.en: Micron Invests in Anthropic and Signs Multi-Year AI-Memory Deal
title.zh: Micron投资Anthropic并签署多年AI存储供应协议

summary.en: Micron reportedly invested in Anthropic's $65 billion Series H and signed a multi-year agreement to supply AI memory. The combined equity and supply relationship links a memory producer directly to a frontier-model customer, but the candidate record does not disclose purchase volumes, pricing, or the HBM-versus-DRAM mix.
summary.zh: 据报道，Micron投资了Anthropic规模650亿美元的H轮融资，并签署多年AI存储供应协议。股权与供货关系把存储厂商直接连接到前沿模型客户，但候选资料未披露采购量、价格以及HBM与DRAM的产品构成。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: MKS Opens Semiconductor Supercenter Factory in Malaysia
title.zh: MKS在马来西亚启用半导体超级工厂

summary.en: MKS opened a new supercenter factory in Malaysia to expand its semiconductor-manufacturing capabilities. The facility adds regional depth for equipment subsystems and process-support products, although the announcement record does not provide capacity, headcount, or customer commitments.
summary.zh: MKS在马来西亚启用新的超级工厂，以扩展半导体制造能力。该设施增强了设备子系统与制程支持产品的区域供应能力，但公告资料未提供产能、员工人数或客户承诺。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: U.S. Raises Concern Over China's Access to Advanced Chipmaking Tools
title.zh: 美国对中国获得先进芯片制造设备表示担忧

summary.en: U.S. officials are concerned that China now has access to top-tier chipmaking tools, according to the AOL-linked report. The concern could support tighter controls or enforcement, but the candidate record names no tool classes or new rule, so it should be read as a policy signal rather than a blanket assessment of China's equipment stack.
summary.zh: 据AOL转载报道，美国官员担心中国如今已获得顶级芯片制造设备。这一担忧可能推动更严格的管制或执法，但候选资料未点名设备类别或新规，因此更应视为政策信号，而非对中国设备体系的全面判断。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Groq Raises $650 Million After Nvidia Talent and IP Deal
title.zh: Groq在Nvidia人才与IP交易后融资6.5亿美元

summary.en: Groq confirmed a $650 million financing round and is rebuilding its staff after Nvidia's reported $20 billion talent-and-IP arrangement with the inference-chip company. The new capital gives Groq runway to expand its inference cloud despite losing key executives, making this a consequential funding event rather than a generic partnership announcement.
summary.zh: Groq确认完成6.5亿美元融资，并在Nvidia与这家推理芯片公司达成据称价值200亿美元的人才与IP安排后重建团队。新资金让Groq即使失去关键高管，仍能继续扩展推理云，因此这是一笔影响实质经营能力的融资，而非泛泛的合作公告。

theme.en: Hardware Co-Design Moves Toward Measured Constraints
theme.zh: 软硬件协同设计转向实测约束

dek.en: This week's work couples algorithm choices to accelerator structure, grounds device and process claims in measurements, and closes verification loops around AI-generated designs. The strongest results expose where projections still depend on memory size, process control, or unreported implementation details.
dek.zh: 本周研究把算法选择与加速器结构更紧密地结合，以实测结果支撑器件和工艺主张，并围绕AI生成设计补上验证闭环。最有价值的结果也明确暴露了其对存储容量、工艺控制或尚未披露实现细节的依赖。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Bendable Self-Powered Silicon Photodetector Reaches 178.8 dB Dynamic Range
title.zh: 可弯曲自供电硅光探测器实现178.8 dB动态范围

papers.authors: L. Qiu, Z. Tian, Z. Zhao, et al.

summary.en: A CuO film conformally deposited on a freestanding pyramid-textured Si layer produces a bendable, self-powered photodetector with a measured 178.8 dB linear dynamic range and 0.69/0.92 microsecond rise/decay times at zero bias. A visible-light positioning demonstration reached 1.4 cm RMS error, while the communication link supported 620 kbps. These are device-level measurements; long-cycle bending durability and manufacturing-scale uniformity remain open questions.
summary.zh: 研究在自支撑金字塔纹理Si薄层上共形沉积CuO，制成可弯曲、自供电光探测器；器件在零偏压下实测线性动态范围178.8 dB，上升/衰减时间为0.69/0.92微秒。可见光定位演示实现1.4 cm均方根误差，通信链路支持620 kbps。结果来自器件级实测，但长期弯折耐久性与规模制造均匀性仍待验证。

title.en: Pulsed RF Bias Tunes Cryogenic Silicon-Grating Etch Profiles
title.zh: 脉冲RF偏压调控低温硅光栅刻蚀轮廓

papers.authors: Z. Shi, M. Lu, N. Tiwale, et al.
papers.venue: Journal of Vacuum Science & Technology A

summary.en: Experiments on 500 nm-wide, 1 micrometer-pitch silicon gratings etched 0.8-1.1 micrometers deep show that 0.5-2 kHz pulsed RF bias and 25%-75% duty cycles strongly affect etch rate, linewidth, and sidewall angle. Moderate 50%-75% duty cycles near 1 kHz best balance anisotropy and throughput by alternating ion-driven etching with passivation recovery. The result adds a practical control knob for cryogenic SF6/O2 etching, but it is demonstrated on one grating geometry rather than a full process window.
summary.zh: 在宽500 nm、节距1微米、刻蚀深度0.8-1.1微米的硅光栅上，实验表明0.5-2 kHz脉冲RF偏压和25%-75%占空比会显著影响刻蚀速率、线宽与侧壁角。约1 kHz、50%-75%占空比通过交替进行离子驱动刻蚀与钝化恢复，在各向异性和产能之间取得较好平衡。该结果为低温SF6/O2刻蚀增加了实用调节手段，但目前只在一种光栅几何结构上验证，尚非完整工艺窗口。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: COMPOSE Fuses CGRA Operations Around Static Timing Slack
title.zh: COMPOSE利用静态时序余量融合CGRA运算

papers.authors: R. Juneja, V. Ranjan, R. Harish, et al.

summary.en: COMPOSE uses static timing information to form composable CGRA processing elements at compile time, spatially fusing operations across loop iterations to attack recurrence-bound loops. The approach aims to reduce serialized dependency handling, intermediate-result registration, and local data movement that fixed processing elements impose. The preprint's candidate abstract is truncated before quantitative results, so throughput and energy claims need confirmation from the full evaluation.
summary.zh: COMPOSE利用静态时序信息在编译期组合CGRA处理单元，并跨循环迭代进行空间运算融合，以加速受递归依赖限制的循环。该方法旨在减少固定处理单元带来的依赖串行化、中间结果寄存以及局部数据搬运。候选摘要在定量结果之前被截断，因此吞吐率与能效主张仍需结合完整评测确认。

title.en: Whisper Dot-Product Offload Cuts Projected Energy-Delay on a CGLA
title.zh: Whisper点积卸载降低CGLA的预计能量延迟

papers.authors: T. Ando, Y. Eto, A. Takeuchi, et al.

summary.en: Profiling finds dot products consume 90.6% of FP16 and 87.1% of Q8_0 execution time for Whisper-tiny.en on Cortex-A72, motivating offload to the programmable IMAX coarse-grained linear array. An FPGA prototype plus a 28 nm, 840 MHz ASIC projection reports 11.58 J PDP for Q8_0, 2.35x below Jetson AGX Orin and 10.48x below RTX 4090 under a TDP-based comparison. The advantage narrows for larger Whisper models as 32 KB local-memory coverage falls, and the headline ASIC figures remain projected rather than measured silicon.
summary.zh: 性能分析显示，在Cortex-A72运行Whisper-tiny.en时，点积占FP16执行时间的90.6%、占Q8_0执行时间的87.1%，因此研究将该内核卸载到可编程IMAX粗粒度线性阵列。基于FPGA原型和28 nm、840 MHz ASIC投影，Q8_0的功率延迟积为11.58 J；按TDP比较，分别比Jetson AGX Orin和RTX 4090低2.35倍与10.48倍。随着32 KB本地存储对更大Whisper模型的覆盖率下降，优势随之收窄，而且主要ASIC指标仍是投影而非实测硅结果。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: A3C3 Jointly Searches AI Models and Accelerator Implementations
title.zh: A3C3联合搜索AI模型与加速器实现

papers.authors: S. Yildirim, Y. Huang, D. Chen

summary.en: A3C3 parameterizes neural-network and accelerator design spaces together, then co-searches model-hardware pairs across accuracy, latency, throughput, energy, and utilization constraints. This directly addresses the inefficiency of designing an accurate model first and adapting it to hardware afterward. The work is a handbook chapter rather than a new silicon result, so it is most useful as a methodology and design-space reference.
summary.zh: A3C3同时参数化神经网络与加速器设计空间，并围绕精度、延迟、吞吐率、能耗和利用率约束联合搜索模型—硬件组合。它直接针对先设计高精度模型、再事后适配硬件所造成的效率损失。该成果是手册章节而非新的流片结果，因此更适合作为方法论与设计空间参考。

title.en: A Reduced RISC-V Core Targets Programmable Tsetlin-Machine Inference
title.zh: 精简RISC-V核心面向可编程Tsetlin Machine推理

papers.authors: C. Gupta, S. Bhatia, S. Priyadarshi, et al.

summary.en: The design profiles Tsetlin-machine workloads and removes unneeded RV32IM instructions and datapath/control complexity to build a domain-specific but programmable RISC-V inference processor. It avoids the tightly coupled host interfaces and microcode dependence common in dedicated Tsetlin accelerators, while retaining a software-visible instruction set. The candidate abstract provides no final speed or energy deltas, so the architecture should be judged as an early design study rather than a demonstrated efficiency lead.
summary.zh: 该设计先分析Tsetlin Machine工作负载，再删减不需要的RV32IM指令以及数据通路和控制复杂度，构建领域专用但仍可编程的RISC-V推理处理器。它避免了专用Tsetlin加速器常见的紧耦合主机接口和微代码依赖，同时保留软件可见指令集。候选摘要未给出最终速度或能耗差异，因此现阶段更应视为早期架构研究，而非已证明的能效领先方案。

title.en: Hardware-Relevant AI Research
title.zh: 硬件相关AI研究

title.en: A Systems Pipeline for Machine Learning on Microcontroller-Class Devices
title.zh: 面向微控制器级设备的机器学习系统流程

summary.en: This systems-oriented paper connects sampling, buffering, feature extraction, class-imbalance validation, quantization, scheduling, and streaming deployment for microcontroller-class inference. It works through inertial recognition using two-second three-axis windows and keyword spotting using MFCCs plus a compact 1D CNN, making hardware constraints explicit across the full pipeline. It is a synthesis and practical guide rather than a new accelerator benchmark, but it is useful for avoiding optimizations that shift cost between preprocessing, runtime, and memory.
summary.zh: 这篇系统导向论文串联了采样、缓冲、特征提取、类别不平衡验证、量化、调度与流式部署，面向微控制器级推理给出完整流程。论文以两秒三轴窗口的惯性识别，以及采用MFCC和紧凑型一维CNN的关键词识别为例，把全流程硬件约束明确化。它属于综合性实践指南而非新的加速器基准，但有助于避免只在预处理、运行时和存储之间转移成本的局部优化。

title.en: Quantum & Photonics
title.zh: 量子与光子学

title.en: An Integrated Bright Source of Polarization-Entangled Photons on Lithium Niobate
title.zh: 铌酸锂芯片集成高亮度偏振纠缠光子源

papers.authors: H. Kwon, C. Kim, H. Kim, et al.

summary.en: The paper reports an integrated bright source of polarization-entangled photons implemented on lithium-niobate photonic chips. Bringing the source on chip can reduce the size and stability overhead of quantum-photonic systems and improve integration with routing and detection. The supplied candidate metadata contains no brightness, fidelity, or loss figures, so quantitative comparison with other entangled-photon sources requires the full paper.
summary.zh: 论文报道了在铌酸锂光子芯片上实现的集成高亮度偏振纠缠光子源。把光源集成到芯片上可降低量子光子系统的体积与稳定性负担，并有利于同路由和探测模块集成。候选资料未提供亮度、保真度或损耗数据，因此与其他纠缠光子源的定量比较仍需阅读原文。

title.en: EDA & Verification
title.zh: EDA与验证

title.en: Formal Verification Closes the Loop on LLM-Generated RTL Assertions
title.zh: 形式验证为LLM生成的RTL断言建立闭环

papers.authors: R. Krishnamurthy, D. Chitnis, T. Prodromakis

summary.en: An open-source framework applies mutation-guided refinement to reject vacuous or weak LLM-generated RTL assertions, selects SMT solvers from RTL structure, and synthesizes counterexample-grounded failure narratives. Across multiple RTL designs, the authors report stronger assertion confidence and less runtime variability than fixed-solver flows. The contribution is the quality-control loop after generation, although the preprint abstract does not provide benchmark counts or absolute proof times.
summary.zh: 这一开源框架利用突变引导优化剔除空洞或薄弱的LLM生成RTL断言，根据RTL结构选择SMT求解器，并生成以反例轨迹为依据的失败解释。作者在多种RTL设计上报告了更高的断言可信度和低于固定求解器流程的运行时间波动。其核心贡献是补上生成后的质量控制闭环，但预印本摘要未提供基准数量或绝对证明时间。

title.en: AI-Generated Pixelated Microwave Filter Is Validated by Field Measurements
title.zh: AI生成的像素化微波滤波器通过场测量验证

papers.authors: H. Zhou, R. Bannister, C. Pierce, et al.

summary.en: A CNN-plus-genetic-algorithm flow synthesizes a pixelated low-pass microwave filter, then validates it with both S-parameters and electro-optical electric-field imaging. The fabricated design delivers a 7 GHz passband and more than 20 dB suppression above 9.5 GHz, with measured field patterns resembling coupled lines or stubs that make the generated topology more interpretable. The result is an experimental EDA demonstration, though broader value depends on extending the method beyond one filter class and frequency target.
summary.zh: 研究以CNN结合遗传算法合成像素化低通微波滤波器，并通过S参数和电光电场成像进行双重验证。制成器件实现7 GHz通带，在9.5 GHz以上抑制度超过20 dB；实测场分布呈现类似耦合传输线或短截线的结构，使AI生成拓扑更易解释。这是一次实验性EDA验证，但更广泛价值仍取决于能否扩展到更多滤波器类型和频率目标。
